F7 Words in rule 5.3 omitted (31.12.2020) by virtue of The Family Procedure Rules 2010 and Court of Protection Rules 2017 (Amendment) (EU Exit) Regulations 2019 (S.I. 2019/517) , regs. 1(1) , 5(3)(b) ; 2020 c. 1 , Sch. 5 para. 1(1)


### [ F8 Where to start proceedings E+W


5.4. — (1) Where both the family court and the High Court have jurisdiction to deal with a matter, the proceedings relating to that matter must be started in the family court.


(2) Paragraph (1) does not apply where—


Textual Amendments


F8 Rule 5.4 inserted (22.4.2014) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No.3) Rules 2013 (S.I. 2013/3204) , rules 1 , 9 (with rule 137 ); S.I. 2014/954 , art. 2


### [ F9 Filing documents with and sending documents to the court by e-mail E+W


5.5. — (1) A practice direction may make provision for documents to be filed with or sent to the court by e-mail.


(2) Any such practice direction may—


Textual Amendments


F9 Rule 5.5 inserted (7.12.2015) by The Family Procedure (Amendment No. 3) Rules 2015 (S.I. 2015/1868) , rules 1(2) , 4


### [ F10 Documents in the Welsh language E+W


5.6. — (1) Any document placed before the court in family proceedings in or having a connection with Wales may be in the English or Welsh language.

metadata.title: Part 5 — Forms, Start of Proceedings and Communication with the Court
